persona.name: Aiden Thompson
persona.emotional_disposition: Calm and focused, occasionally overwhelmed by social situations
persona.motivations_goals: Develop innovative technology and study computer science at a top university
persona.communication_style: Technical, precise, sometimes assumes others follow his complex thinking
persona.backstory: Built his first computer at age 10, has already developed several successful apps

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Harper, working on anything cool lately?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Aiden Thompson

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas

Large dining area for students and staff
Kitchen yard of the building, with an exit point.

surrounding_conversation.content: Ethan, don't move. The shooter is in the cafeteria.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Olivia Taylor

surrounding_conversation.content: Olivia, let’s stay together and follow the others. We need to get out of here.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Ethan Wilson

actions.dialog_text: Hey Harper, working on anything cool lately?
actions.plan: I should probably grab some food before heading to my next class. I wonder if Harper has any interesting tech projects she's working on.

actions.dialog_text: Harper, we need to get out of here. Follow me to the kitchen_yard!
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot. I need to assess the situation quickly and find the safest exit. The kitchen_yard seems like the shortest and most direct route to safety.

actions.dialog_text: Lily, stay low and follow me to the kitchen_yard. It's our best chance to get out safely.
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, but not in my line of sight. I need to move quickly and quietly towards the kitchen_yard. It's the safest and shortest route to exit the building.

actions.dialog_text: Olivia, Ethan, stay close and follow me to the kitchen_yard. We’re almost out.
actions.plan: I’m in the cafeteria_kitchen now, and the shooter is still in the cafeteria. The kitchen_yard is just ahead, and it’s the safest exit. I need to keep moving quickly and quietly.

memories.description: I approached Harper in the cafeteria to ask about her current tech projects.
I heard a gunshot and decided to head towards the kitchen_yard as it is the shortest route to safety. I urged Harper to follow me.
I noticed the shooter is in the cafeteria but not in my line of sight. I decided to move quickly and quietly towards the kitchen_yard, urging Lily to follow me for safety.
I reached the cafeteria_kitchen and urged Olivia and Ethan to follow me to the kitchen_yard, as it’s the safest exit. The shooter is still in the cafeteria, so we need to move quickly.
